name: Chili with Panang Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stockpot, sauté ground beef until browned.
2. Drain excess fat and add panang curry base.
3. Add onion and garlic, and continue to sauté for 2-3 minutes or until lightly browned.
4. Stir in tomatoes, kidney beans, and Garlic Chili Pepper Sauce.
5. Simmer the mixture for 30 to 40 minutes.
6. Serve with finely shredded cheese.
Garlic chili pepper sauce will make your chili very spicy. You may only want to add a portion of this to your recipe.
